widget.name: SVG Force Graph Chart
widget.description: Force-directed graph (SVG.js): Les Misérables-style JSON, custom forces, drag and selection. Optional expression JSON or data URL; demo dataset when empty.

property.caption: Graph JSON (expression)
property.description: Expression returning a JSON string: { "nodes":[{"id":"…","group":n}…], "links":[{"source":"id","target":"id","value":n}…] }. When empty, Graph data URL or demo data is used.

property.caption: Graph data URL
property.description: Optional HTTPS URL returning the same JSON schema. Used when Graph JSON is empty. Mind CORS and Content Security Policy in the Mendix runtime.

property.caption: Load demo when empty
property.description: When both Graph JSON and Graph data URL are empty, fetch the built-in Les Misérables sample (external URL).

property.caption: Use group colors
property.description: Color nodes by their numeric group; otherwise use the static node color below.

property.caption: Static node color
property.description: Hex color when Use group colors is false.

property.caption: Node count
property.description: Number of nodes to take from the dataset (first N in file order), clamped between 10 and the dataset size when possible.

property.caption: Node radius (px)
property.description: Approximate node circle radius in pixels.

property.caption: Link distance
property.description: Target spring length for links (pixels scale).

property.caption: Repulsion
property.description: Negative values push nodes apart (same sign convention as d3.forceManyBody).

property.caption: Width unit
property.description: Pixels: fixed width. Percentage: width as a share of the parent container.

property.caption: Width
property.description: Width in pixels, or percentage of parent (0–100) when Width unit is Percentage.

property.caption: Height unit
property.description: How height is interpreted (similar to the core Area chart widget).

property.caption: Height
property.description: Height in pixels, or percentage (0–100) depending on Height unit.
